product.name: Sprinkle Tweed Pants
product.description: Women's cream tweed trousers with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, an adjustable elastic waist, a relaxed baggy leg, and fringed hems.

audience.seed: A woman choosing a visually distinctive pair of trousers for herself and considering fragrance as part of the same getting-ready moment.

positioning.customer_belief: A getting-ready choice feels more complete when the outfit has one memorable visual detail and the wearer has chosen a scent for the moment.
positioning.problem_statement: A basic outfit can feel unfinished, while choosing too many competing pieces can make getting ready feel harder than it needs to be.

positioning.companion_role: The Sprinkle Tweed Pants are the FREE exact-parity women's statement trousers.

campaign.research_topic: Current buyer demand, questions, objections, styling moments, and purchase signals for Vanilla Sprinkles-style women's multicoloured tweed baggy trousers; current perfume desire, scent-language, application, objections, and purchase moments; and evidence of a shared getting-ready moment between a statement trouser and personal fragrance.

creative_direction.visual_style: Premium direct-response editorial photography with believable phone-camera texture and accurate product proportions.
creative_direction.buyer_world: Everyday environments in the target market that match the campaign's locked use moments.
creative_direction.cast_rule: Use 24 visibly distinct adults who fit the primary buyer; vary apparent age, skin tone, facial features, hair, wardrobe, camera, and lighting.

research_policy.rule: Intake seeds may shape current queries but cannot become evidence. Product facts must map to fresh official-reference capture, and buyer claims must come from this run's retrieval.

preview.footer_disclosure: Promotional lifestyle scenes are creative representations. Product details and purchase terms appear on this page.

copy.announcement: You receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE with your $29 Auralo purchase.
copy.eyebrow: Plans on. You start with the pants.
copy.headline: Sprinkle Tweed Pants — FREE With Your $29 Auralo Pheromone Perfume Purchase.
copy.subheadline: You tie the braided drawcord, place two or three drops at your pulse points, take your keys, and head for the door.
copy.bridge_heading: Pull on the pants you came to see.
copy.bridge_body: You begin with cream tweed, multicoloured flecks, a braided drawcord, and fringed hems—then you keep moving toward the plan outside.
desire_questions: What if Auralo's floral-amber scent became the finishing moment before your hand closed around the keys?
Picture this: the Sprinkle Tweed Pants become the look you choose before your next city moment?
Could Auralo's jasmine, rose, and pink pepper scent be the one you choose before you leave?
Picture this: you step into cream tweed, draw in the braided cord, and watch the fringed hems move toward the door?
Imagine choosing your published size, checking the relaxed silhouette, and getting on with your evening?
What if the pants you keep thinking about were already tied at your waist as you reached for the keys?
Could you keep the pants on as daylight changes and a new hour begins?
copy.story_heading: Follow your hands from waist to wrist to keys.
copy.story_intro: You start at the chair, dress for the plan, pause at your pulse points, and leave through the door.

story.heading: Start with the pants.
story.body: You lift the Sprinkle Tweed Pants from the chair and bring the cream tweed into the light before you step in.

story.heading: Step into the look you chose.
story.body: You guide each foot through, pull the waistband into place, and let the relaxed shape fall from your waist.

story.heading: Set the waist your way.
story.body: You adjust the waistband and check the shape in the mirror. The pants have an adjustable elastic waist and are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit.

story.heading: Tie the braided drawcord.
story.body: You pull, cross, and tie the drawcord at your waist. The pants are hand-crafted in cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.

story.heading: Choose from the published size bands.
story.body: You check the published band before you decide. The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.

story.heading: Check the length as you turn.
story.body: You look from waistband to hem before taking your next step. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

story.heading: Keep the tweed away from snags.
story.body: You move rough accessories aside before dressing. The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces and accessories that may snag it.

story.heading: Open Auralo at the vanity.
story.body: You leave the full-length mirror, reach for the bottle, and open it at the vanity. Auralo is a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume.

story.heading: Read the scent description.
story.body: You pause over the named notes before applying. The scent profile combines jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper.

story.heading: Place the drops at your pulse points.
story.body: You measure the application and follow the directions. Apply two or three drops to pulse points such as the wrists, behind the ears, neck, and inner elbows.

story.heading: Slip the bottle into your bag.
story.body: You set the cap, place the 15 ml bottle inside your open bag, and turn back toward the mirror.

story.heading: Take one last look.
story.body: You smooth your top, leave the braided drawcord tied, and watch the fringed hems move as you turn from the mirror.

story.heading: Take your bag and keys.
story.body: You close the bag, lift your keys, and cross the hallway in the Sprinkle Tweed Pants.

story.heading: Carry the plan through the door.
story.body: You buy Auralo Pheromone Perfume for $29, receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE, choose your published size, and step toward the plan outside.

proof_sections.paid_body: You open a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume and use two or three drops at your wrists, behind your ears, neck, or inner elbows.
proof_sections.free_heading: Choose the Sprinkle Tweed Pants you noticed.
proof_sections.free_body: You receive cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, fringed hems, an adjustable elastic waist, and a relaxed, baggy fit.
proof_sections.relationship_heading: Move from waist to wrist to keys.
proof_sections.relationship_body: You tie the drawcord, apply two or three drops at a pulse point, close your bag, and take your keys when it is time to leave.
proof_sections.decision_heading: Check every stated detail before you decide.
proof_sections.decision_body: You can choose XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, or L-XL for EU 42-44, then review the $29 price, FREE pants, shipping, returns, warranty, and care details.

copy.final_heading: Plans on. Take the next step.
copy.final_body: You choose your published size, buy Auralo Pheromone Perfume for $29, receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE, and get ready for the door.
copy.faq_heading: Choose with the verified details in front of you.

faq.question: What will you see in the Sprinkle Tweed Pants?
faq.answer: You will see the stated construction details. The pants are hand-crafted in cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.

faq.question: How will you adjust the fit?
faq.answer: You can adjust the waistband. The pants have an adjustable elastic waist and are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit.

faq.question: Which published size can you choose?
faq.answer: You can use the published bands. The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.

faq.question: What length should you check?
faq.answer: You can check the published length. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

faq.question: How should you care for the pants?
faq.answer: You should follow the stated care instructions. The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces and accessories that may snag it.

faq.question: What is Auralo?
faq.answer: You receive the stated format. Auralo is a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume.

faq.question: Which notes can you expect in the scent description?
faq.answer: You can read the stated note list. The scent profile combines jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper.

faq.question: How do you apply Auralo?
faq.answer: You can follow the stated directions. Apply two or three drops to pulse points such as the wrists, behind the ears, neck, and inner elbows.

faq.question: What do you pay and receive?
faq.answer: You pay $29 for Auralo Pheromone Perfume and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE with the qualifying $29 purchase.

faq.question: Which return and warranty terms do you receive?
faq.answer: You receive 90-day returns and a five-year warranty.

scenario_cards.headline: Take your keys.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You reach past your gym zip-up, close your fingers around the keys, and let the braided drawcord stay tied at your waist.
scenario_cards.context: You are one action away from leaving for the evening.
scenario_cards.outcome: You turn the key hand toward the doorway.
scenario_cards.cast_description: Distinct woman, mid 20s, medium brown skin, high cheekbones, short springy curls
scenario_cards.setting: an evening plan where she wants her outfit and scent to feel intentional

scenario_cards.headline: Cross the hallway.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You move down the hallway in your deep green blouse and Sprinkle Tweed Pants, carrying your closed bag at your side.
scenario_cards.context: You are leaving home for a social plan.
scenario_cards.outcome: You arrive at the open doorway.
scenario_cards.cast_description: Distinct woman, late 50s, pale olive skin, square face, silver blunt bob
scenario_cards.setting: getting ready for a social plan where one visible statement piece and one personal scent can complete the ritual

scenario_cards.headline: Step through the door.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You cross the threshold in your cream turtleneck and the cream tweed pants while the fringed hems move with your stride.
scenario_cards.context: You are taking the chosen look into your weekend plan.
scenario_cards.outcome: You pull the door closed behind you.
scenario_cards.cast_description: Distinct woman, early 30s, deep brown skin, heart-shaped face, long natural twists
scenario_cards.setting: a weekend city outing built around a simple top and distinctive trousers

scenario_cards.headline: Meet the next hour outside.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You arrive in your plum dinner jacket and Sprinkle Tweed Pants, set your closed bag beside your chair, and keep the keys in your hand.
scenario_cards.context: You have carried the departure sequence into a real evening destination.
scenario_cards.outcome: You take your seat with the pants still leading the look.
scenario_cards.cast_description: Distinct woman, mid 40s, fair freckled skin, oval face, dark red shoulder-length hair
scenario_cards.setting: an evening plan where she wants her outfit and scent to feel intentional

claim_ledger.claim: Sprinkle Tweed Pants is FREE with the qualifying $29 purchase.
The pants are hand-crafted in cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.
The pants have an adjustable elastic waist and are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit.
The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.
The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.
The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces and accessories that may snag it.
Auralo is a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume.
The scent profile combines jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper.
Apply two or three drops to pulse points such as the wrists, behind the ears, neck, and inner elbows.

footer_disclosure: Promotional lifestyle scenes are creative representations. Product details and purchase terms appear on this page.
